safety.response: Stop progression. Show recovery / medical-advice note. No retry pressure.

conditioning.cause: Did not complete the required work
conditioning.response: Retry a modified session, or reduce only the affected section by one step.

technical.cause: Technique broke down beyond the difficulty's limit
technical.response: Recommend Practice Mode drills for the failing technique + suggest a lower difficulty.

tactical.response: Repeat the same mission once; if missed again, lower only the tactical layer.

note: Evaluated at session end; feeds the existing outcome screens and anti-cheat integrity evaluation.
